description: Event sourcing models — base RunEvent, outbox pattern (Entry/Sink), boundary hooks, core lifecycle event types with order validation, and typed Lifecycle event subclasses.

files.responsibility: Base event — runId, seq, turnNo, type, payload, createdAt. Factory for extension events with prefix validation.
Outbox pattern entry — id, sink, event, attempts, availableAt.
Boundary hook invocation event — hookName + mutable context array.
Boundary hook name constants — BEFORE/AFTER_COMMAND_APPLY, BEFORE_TURN_DISPATCH, AFTER_TURN_COMMIT, BEFORE_RUN_FINALIZE + extension prefix.
Lifecycle event type constants, class map, and validateOrder() for structural validation of event streams.

subNamespaces.description: Typed lifecycle event subclasses — AgentStart/End, TurnStart/End, MessageStart/Update/End, ToolExecutionStart/Update/End.
